2605.30052.title: REPOT: Recoverable Program-of-Thought via Checkpoint Repair
2605.30052.paper_summary: One-shot Program-of-Thought (PoT) emits a Python program that prints a primitive-action plan; a single invalid action silently invalidates the trajectory. We introduce RePoT (Recoverable PoT): a deterministic verified replay that walks the plan through the environment to its first invalid transition, then one LLM call that resumes from the verified prefix. RePoT costs at most one extra LLM call on the ~14% of problems where PoT fails. RePoT beats PoT by +3 to +11pp across four closed-model configurations on PuzzleZoo-775 and peaks at 96.9% vs 86.3% on gpt-5.4-mini-medium; against the matched-budget PoT-retry baseline, RePoT wins decisively on Gemini (+3.8pp, 95% CI [+2.2,+5.4]), is within sampling noise on GPT-medium and Claude, and loses on GPT-mini -- a capability-scaling pattern we begin to address with Adaptive RePoT, a rule-based dispatcher that routes between suffix repair and a fresh PoT retry based on verified-prefix length (preliminary). We replicate on PlanBench Blocksworld (+1.1 to +11.4pp) and on four open-weights models (+3.3 to +20.0pp on three of four). On Derail-550, our controlled recovery benchmark, every condition with access to checkpoint information clears >=30% on GPT-medium and >=70% on Gemini, vs <=3.1% for error-only feedback -- showing that checkpoint information, not the specific verified-prefix tail, is the load-bearing recovery signal.
2605.30052.paper_summary_zh: 一次性思維程序（PoT）輸出一個打印原始行動計劃的Python程序；一個無效的行動會默默地使軌跡無效。我們介紹了RePoT（可恢復的PoT）：一種確定性的驗證重播，將計劃在環境中推進到其第一個無效轉換，然後進行一次LLM調用以從驗證的前綴恢復。RePoT在約14%的PoT失敗的問題中最多只需額外一次LLM調用。RePoT在PuzzleZoo-775的四個封閉模型配置中比PoT提高了3到11個百分點，在gpt-5.4-mini-medium上達到96.9%對86.3%；對於匹配預算的PoT重試基準，RePoT在Gemini上明顯獲勝（+3.8個百分點，95%置信區間[+2.2,+5.4]），在GPT-medium和Claude上與取樣噪聲相當，而在GPT-mini上失利——這是一種能力擴展模式，我們開始用自適應RePoT來解決，這是一個基於規則的調度器，根據驗證前綴的長度在後綴修復和新的PoT重試之間進行路由（初步）。我們在PlanBench Blocksworld上複製了(+1.1到+11.4個百分點)和在四個開放權重模型上(+3.3到+20.0個百分點中的三個)。在我們的控制恢復基準Derail-550中，所有能夠訪問檢查點信息的條件在GPT-medium上達到>=30%和在Gemini上>=70%，而僅有錯誤反饋的情況下則<=3.1%——顯示檢查點信息，而不是特定的驗證前綴尾部，是承載恢復信號的關鍵。
2605.30052.author: Parsa Mazaheri et.al.
